title: Remote Developer Jobs Bangalore - LinkedIn
summary: Largest volume of remote developer listings from top Indian & global firms. Filter by salary & experience.

title: Remote Developer Jobs Bangalore - Glassdoor
summary: Salary-verified listings with company reviews. Great for benchmarking compensation.

title: Remote Developer Jobs Bangalore - Indeed
summary: Aggregated listings across multiple boards. Use salary filter for ₹12L+ roles.

title: Remote Developer Jobs - RemoteOK
summary: Global remote dev roles; many accept India-based candidates. Often USD-compensated.

title: Remote Developer Jobs - Wellfound (AngelList)
summary: Startup-focused roles with equity. Strong for early-stage & growth-stage companies.

title: Full Stack Developer Remote - Naukri
summary: India's largest job board; filter by WFH and ₹10L+ salary bracket.

title: Backend Developer Remote Bangalore - Instahyre
summary: Recruiter-driven platform; high response rate for 3+ YOE developers.

title: Remote Software Engineer Jobs - Turing
summary: Matches Indian developers with US companies for remote roles at competitive USD salaries.
